_comment: Semantic zone name -> list of segment ids for the Porsche 718 Cayman GT4 Clubsport. Seeded 2026-06-29 from car-independent evidence: number-block placement (numbers only land on doors/hood/rear), sponsor-block placement (flat panels), and the pattern-derived seam graph with mirror/seam classification (zones/seams.json). Most panel identities still need one in-sim calibration capture to pin down — see _needs_insim.
_groups_comment: Named unions of zones for convenient multi-zone fills. Usable anywhere a zone name is.

_evidence.doors=44,80: strong: each carries a competition number block (blocks #2,#3) AND a large sponsor block, and the seam graph links 44<->80 as a det=-1.0 MIRROR pair (595 inliers, 1.6px) -> same part, opposite sides. L vs R is provisional (not yet pinned to a physical side).
_evidence.number_panel_seg4: seg4 (top of UV, ~147k px) carries number block #1. Numbers only go on doors/hood/rear, so seg4 is the front (hood/nose) or rear number panel -> identity pending in-sim.
_evidence.method: Replicates the 911 pipeline: extract -> zones (88 segments) -> seams (27 relations). Same as the 911, confident panel naming awaits the calibration livery applied in-sim.

_mirror_pairs._comment: det~=-1 reflection pairs from seams.json = left/right twins of the same part. These are the scaffold for keeping L/R consistent; assign one side in-sim and the twin follows.

_true_seams._comment: det~=+1 proper-rigid adjacencies (real 3D seams for cross-panel design continuity).

_needs_insim._comment: Resolvable with one calibration-livery capture (templates/porsche_718_gt4/calibration/) or Jay's knowledge.
_needs_insim.left_right_sides: door_left/right and every mirror pair: which segment is the physical left vs right side
_needs_insim.roof_hood_rear: the large central/top panels (seg55 largest at 202k with 2 sponsor blocks; seg2/12 top-left with the PORSCHE banner; seg58/69 center pair; seg61/62/63/68 right cluster) are unassigned pending the segid/uv_grid decode
_needs_insim.unsegmented_body: large blue (#3e89cd) areas were not enclosed by the green wireframe (same ~gap as the 911); the uv_grid pass will reveal the true paintable area to re-segment

_unverified._comment: Largest unnamed segments with their seam-graph hints, for the in-sim pass.
